brands.sectionDescription: Curated selection of India's most trusted and premium bicycle manufacturers.

hero.description: Legendary performance. Trusted by millions with decades of engineering excellence and innovation.

vesco.description: Robust craftsmanship with premium durability. Engineered for comfort across every terrain.

sunbride.description: Refined aesthetics meet reliable performance. Stylish cycles designed for the modern rider.

afro.description: Bold designs with unmatched value. Adventure-ready cycles for riders who dare to explore.

sizes.sectionDescription: Choose the perfect wheel size for every age and riding style.
sizes.sizeGuide: Not sure which size fits? Our experts can help.
sizes.desc16: Perfect starter bikes for young riders. Safe, lightweight and colourful.
sizes.desc18: Confident cruising with training-wheel-ready frames and easy grip brakes.
sizes.desc20: Adventure-ready bikes with geared options and durable alloy wheels.
sizes.desc24: Sport-tuned geometry with multi-speed gearing for school and beyond.
sizes.desc26: Full-size performance cycles — mountain, road, hybrid and city options.
sizes.desc30: Premium large-frame cycles for taller riders. Maximum speed and comfort.

collection.sectionDescription: Explore our curated selection of premium cycles from top brands.
collection.noFeaturedSub: Add cycles from the admin panel to showcase them here.

compare.sectionDescription: Compare up to 3 cycles side-by-side to find your perfect match.
compare.emptySubtitle: Browse our collection and tap "Add to Compare" on any cycle.
compare.previewDescription: Not sure which model fits your riding style and budget? Use our side-by-side comparison tool to evaluate two cycles across specs, price, and build quality — instantly.
compare.verdictMatchPerfect: Both cycles match perfectly in pricing.
compare.pickMore: You have selected {{name}}. Add one more cycle from the collection to compare.

gallery.sectionDescription: Step into our world-class showroom experience.

img1.title: Hero Sprint Pro Display
img1.desc: The flagship Hero Sprint Pro cycle displayed on our modern showroom stand.

img2.title: Vesco Road Beast
img2.desc: Premium aerodynamics and lightweight carbon frame engineered for high velocity.

img3.title: Sun Bride Urban Showcase
img3.desc: State-of-the-art hybrid cycle configured at our showroom fitting station.

img4.title: Afro Alpha Trailblazer
img4.desc: Equipped with heavy-duty mountain suspension and all-terrain traction control.

img5.title: Happy Rider on City Trails
img5.desc: A proud customer exploring the Hyderabad trails on their new Laxmi cycle.

img6.title: Showroom Interior Glow
img6.desc: Modern industrial showroom styling with ambient highlights and displays.

img7.title: Vesco Special Edition
img7.desc: Exquisite attention to frame detailing and premium design craftsmanship.

img8.title: Laxmi Cycling Club Ride
img8.desc: Weekend group rides connecting cycle enthusiasts across the community.

reviews.sectionDescription: Real feedback from cycling enthusiasts who trust Laxmi Cycles Store for their riding journeys.

fallbackComments.c1: Excellent service! Got my Hero MTB cycle at a great price. The staff was very helpful and knowledgeable. The collection is outstanding.
fallbackComments.c2: Beautiful showroom! My daughter loves her new kids cycle. Quality is top-notch and the sizing guide helped us pick the absolute perfect model.
fallbackComments.c3: Best cycle store in Hyderabad. Wide variety of models, honest pricing, and extremely quick delivery. Extremely satisfied with my Vesco Hybrid!

contact.sectionDescription: Drop by our luxury showroom to test ride our premium collection or reach out online for instant sales and service support.
contact.whatsappMessage:
Hello Laxmi Cycles Store,
I have a general enquiry about your collection.
Please assist.
contact.loginRequired: Please login to send a message
contact.sendSuccess: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.

footer.tagline: Your premier destination for quality cycles. Experience the finest selection of bikes from top brands in our state-of-the-art showroom.
footer.copyright: Laxmi Cycles Store. All rights reserved.

login.subtitleForgot: Enter your details to reset credentials
login.resetSuccess: Password updated successfully! Please log in.

enquiry.successMsg: Enquiry sent! We'll contact you shortly.
enquiry.loginRequired: Please login to send an enquiry

about.storyTitle: More Than Just a Cycle Shop
about.storyDesc: Laxmi Cycles Store was built on a simple belief: every person deserves a premium cycling experience. Since 2009, we've been Hyderabad's most trusted destination for quality cycles, expert advice, and unbeatable service.

v1.title: Quality First
v1.desc: We stock only the finest cycles from trusted manufacturers with proven track records.

v2.title: Customer Focused
v2.desc: Your satisfaction is our priority. Our expert staff guides you to the perfect cycle.

v3.title: Expert Knowledge
v3.desc: With 15+ years in the industry, we know cycles inside out and share that expertise.

v4.title: Passion for Cycling
v4.desc: We are cyclists ourselves. That passion drives everything we do at Laxmi Cycles.

m1.event: Laxmi Cycles Store founded in Hyderabad

m2.event: Expanded showroom to 3000 sq.ft premium space

m4.event: Launched online presence and digital catalogue

m5.event: New premium showroom with 200+ cycle models
